content.content:
1	"""Hypura Harness — central FastAPI daemon (default port 18794; avoids OpenClaw Bridge on 18790).
2	
3	OpenClaw calls this as a general-purpose agent toolkit.
4	"""
5	from __future__ import annotations
6	
7	import asyncio
8	import json
9	import logging
10	from pathlib import Path
11	from typing import Any, Literal
12	
13	import httpx
14	import uvicorn
15	import threading
16	from code_runner import CodeRunner
17	from companion_bridge import CompanionBridge
18	from fastapi import BackgroundTasks, FastAPI, HTTPException
19	from lora_jobs import JobStore
20	from lora_paths import resolve_artifacts_root
21	from lora_paths import status_summary as lora_status_summary
22	from lora_service import (
23	    run_build_curriculum,
24	    run_grpo_job_async,
25	    run_train_job,
26	)
27	from osc_controller import OSCController, OSCListener, load_param_map
28	from pydantic import BaseModel
29	from shinka_adapter import ShinkaAdapter
30	from skill_generator import SkillGenerator
31	from voicevox_sequencer import VoicevoxSequencer
32	from web_scavenger import WebScavenger
33	from knowledge_graph_shinka import KnowledgeGraphShinka
34	import psutil
35	import redis_loop
36	
37	def is_vrchat_active() -> bool:
38	    """Check if VRChat.exe is currently running."""
39	    for proc in psutil.process_iter(['name']):
40	        if proc.info['name'] == 'VRChat.exe':
41	            return True
42	    return False
43	
44	DEFAULT_DAEMON_PORT = 18794
45	
46	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
47	ROOT = Path(__file__).parent
48	REPO_ROOT = ROOT.parent.parent.parent
49	CONFIG_PATH = ROOT.parent / "config" / "harness.config.json"
50	config: dict[str, Any] = {}
51	job_store: JobStore | None = None
52	
53	
54	def load_config() -> dict[str, Any]:
55	    """Load JSON config from disk into the module-level ``config`` dict."""
56	    global config
57	    if CONFIG_PATH.exists():
58	        config = json.loads(CONFIG_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
59	    else:
60	        config = {}
61	    return config
62	
63	
64	load_config()
65	
66	app = FastAPI(title="Hypura Harness", version="0.1.0")
67	
68	osc_ctrl: OSCController = OSCController(
69	    host=config.get("osc_host", "127.0.0.1"),
70	    port=config.get("osc_port", 9000),
71	    param_map=load_param_map(),
72	)
73	osc_listen: OSCListener = OSCListener(
74	    host=config.get("osc_host", "127.0.0.1"),
75	    port=config.get("osc_receive_port", 9001),
76	)
77	voicevox_seq: VoicevoxSequencer = VoicevoxSequencer(
78	    voicevox_url=config.get("voicevox_url", "http://127.0.0.1:50021"),
79	    cable_device_name=config.get("virtual_cable_name", "CABLE Input"),
80	)
81	code_runner_instance: CodeRunner = CodeRunner()
82	skill_gen: SkillGenerator = SkillGenerator()
83	shinka: ShinkaAdapter = ShinkaAdapter()
84	companion_bridge: CompanionBridge = CompanionBridge(
85	    config.get("companion_url", "http://127.0.0.1:18791"),
86	)
87	web_scavenger: WebScavenger = WebScavenger()
88	knowledge_graph: KnowledgeGraphShinka = KnowledgeGraphShinka()
89	
90	
91	class OscRequest(BaseModel):
92	    action: str
93	    payload: dict[str, Any] = {}
94	
95	
96	class SpeakRequest(BaseModel):
97	    text: str = ""
98	    emotion: str = "neutral"
99	    speaker: int = 8
100	    scene: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
